allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); text=data[0]['text'] if isinstance\(data,list\) else data; parsed=json.loads\(text\) if isinstance\(text,str\) else text; pages=parsed.get\('pages',[]\) if isinstance\(parsed,dict\) else []; print\([p.get\('name'\) for p in pages][:20]\)")
